title: Sivalinga

title: Regai
subTitle: SI Vetri suspects a medical team of orchestrating a deadly cover-up, staging the deaths of clinical trial participants as accidents. He races against time to expose this dark conspiracy.

title: Kiss
subTitle: A gifted musician discovers he has a mystical power whenever a couple kisses, he can see their romantic future. But when a vision reveals a tragic fate for the woman he loves, he embarks on a desperate journey to rewrite destiny and save their love.

subTitle: Kousalya, a farmer's daughter, dreams of becoming an international cricketer and winning the Cricket World Cup. She faces various challenges as she pursues her dream with the support of her father.

subTitle: Separated at a young age, twin brothers encounter each other after growing up and their similar appearance creates confusion for their respective love interests.

title: Madha Yaanai Koottam
subTitle: Parthiban, the son of a powerful late patriarch, accidentally kills the son of Veera Thevar, while trying to save his stepbrother. Veera then decides to avenge his son's death by murdering Parthiban.

title: Uriyadi 2
subTitle: Lenin Vijay, a young man, secures a job at a factory, along with two other friends. However, when he learns that the place is flouting environmental norms and causing deaths, he seeks justice.
